MRP configuration settings
--------------------------
FastMRP supported...........................no
Domain ID...................................255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255.255 (Default)
Domain name.................................
Port number, Primary........................1/2
Port number, Secondary......................1/5
Port oper state, Primary....................not connected
Port oper state, Secondary..................not connected
Fixed backup port (manager only)............disabled
Mode (administrative setting)...............client
Mode (real operating state).................client
Recovery delay..............................200ms
Recovery delay supported....................200ms,500ms
Advanced mode (react on link change)........enabled
Manager priority............................32768
VLAN ID.....................................1
Operation...................................enabled

General operating states:
Configuration info..........................ring port link error

Manager-related operating states:
Ring state..................................undefined
Redundancy exists...........................no
Ring open count.............................0
Last ring open change.......................1970-01-01 00:00:00
Round trip delay max........................0
Round trip delay min........................0
Non-blocking client support.................disabled

Client-related operating states:
Blocked support.............................enabled
